text:
All of The Freedoms is the 5th track on the "Attack on Titan" The Final Season Original Soundtrack 02, as well as the 5th track on disc 2 of the "Attack on Titan" The Final Season Original Soundtrack Complete Album. It was composed and arranged by Kohta Yamamoto.

All occurrences

Episode 79 - Grisha breaks down after having killed the Reiss family
Episode 80 - Grisha kills the Reiss family and breaks down
Episode 81 - Reiner and Gabi discuss what to do about the Rumbling
Episode 82 - Floch promises Jean that they are free now
Episode 85 - Floch and Kiyomi Azumabito chat
